description: Create a topologically colored political map of the world using the shapefile at /home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp so that no two adjacent countries share the same color. Run the topological coloring algorithm with a minimum of 4 colors to generate a 'color_id' field. Apply categorized symbology to the layer based on the 'color_id' field. Export the resulting colored layer as GeoJSON to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/world_colored.geojson and save the QGIS project as world_map_colored.qgz in /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/.
